subcodes.first_line: Say: O my God, my God! Thou seest and knowest what hath befallen Thy captives from the manifestations of oppression and the daysprings of tyranny [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل الهی الهی تری و تعلم ما ورد علی اسرائک من مظاهر الظلم و مطالع الطغیان بعد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @knowledge; recognition of God
